name: System Monitor Panel
description:
Show CPU, memory, disk, network and temperature readings in the top panel, with a dropdown dashboard for per-core CPU usage, a memory and swap breakdown, per-filesystem disk usage, live network speeds and hardware sensor readings.

Each metric can be toggled independently in the panel and in the dropdown. The refresh interval, temperature unit (C/F), network unit (bytes/bits) and panel position are all configurable.
